evidence: "good movie, true story. really enjoyed it."
"An interesting story about what happened in the United States during World War 2 in regard to the Holocaust & what Jewish leaders and the government were and were not doing."
"It was a fun movie to watch on my kindle on a flight. Very entertaining. Typical Woody Allen stuff."
"I have not been able to stop thinking about it since I saw it days ago!"

"I have not been able to stop thinking about it since I saw it days ago!"

summary: The user shows a strong preference for drama and historical narratives, particularly those with high-quality acting and emotional depth. They appreciate slower pacing and simple storytelling, indicating a focus on character development and emotional impact over complex plots.
